headline: Fastenal Earnings Due With S&P 500 Stock In Buy Zone
summary: Fastenal prepares to reports earnings for the first quarter early Monday.  On Friday, Fastenal stock rose in a buy zone after breaking out amid the broader Iran war ceasefire rally.  For the full year, the S&P 500 company, a supplier of fasteners, nuts, screws and bolts, is expected to achieve 10.6% sales growth vs. the low single digits just two years ago.
